goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory receipt authority artifact builder for runtime patch audit receipt record audit receipt preflights without runtime execution, durable receipt writes, patch application, route/server mutation, or permit consumption.
scope_out: Do not execute runtime, write receipts or audits, perform durable persistence, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Runtime patch audit receipt record audit receipt preflight artifacts can be authorized in memory.
Authority id, authorized-by ref, and expiry ref are required.
Runtime execution, receipt writes, audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, route/server mutation, and permit consumption remain false.
assumptions: Durable receipt persistence and receipt creation require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authorized-by ref, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime execution, receipt write, durable audit write, durable persistence, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-209 preflighted runtime patch audit receipt record audit receipts without authorizing or writing them.
